summary: Tested shared cart feature between Calculator and Search tabs, RFQ submission modal, and backend API integration. Backend tests: 12/12 passed. Frontend: Core functionality works but has UX issues with duplicate cart indicators.

ui_bugs.issue: TWO overlapping cart floating buttons exist - local 'floatingQuoteBadge' (bottom: 90) and shared 'FloatingCartButton' (bottom: 100). Both show similar content, causing UX confusion.
data-testid='floating-cart-btn' selector not accessible via Playwright - React Native Web may not expose data-testid properly

integration_issues.issue: Items are added to BOTH local 'quoteItems' state AND shared 'cartItems' context simultaneously. The local 'Generate Quote' button bypasses the shared RfqSubmissionModal and creates quote directly.
CartViewModal and RfqSubmissionModal are implemented but the local Quote Builder modal takes precedence when clicking the visible cart button

issues: Two similar-looking cart indicators at bottom-right corner
Packing Type and Freight Pincode fields in Calculator form are set BEFORE adding to cart, not at RFQ submission

action_items: CRITICAL: Decide on single cart UX - either remove local 'floatingQuoteBadge' and use only shared FloatingCartButton, OR remove shared cart and use only local quote builder
Add Customer RFQ No. field to Calculator form (currently only in RfqSubmissionModal which is bypassed)
Fix data-testid accessibility for FloatingCartButton in React Native Web
Consider moving Packing Type and Freight Pincode to RfqSubmissionModal for consistency with requirements
critical_code_review_comments: calculator.tsx:865-868 - Dual cart implementation adds items to both local quoteItems AND shared cartItems - should be consolidated
calculator.tsx:1725-1740 - Local floatingQuoteBadge renders before FloatingCartButton causing click interception
FloatingCartButton.tsx:29 - data-testid attribute may not work in React Native Web context
RfqSubmissionModal.tsx has all required fields (Packing Type, Freight Pincode, Customer RFQ No.) but is bypassed by Calculator's local 'Generate Quote' flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: The shared cart feature (CartContext, FloatingCartButton, CartViewModal, RfqSubmissionModal) is implemented correctly but there's a dual cart system in Calculator tab. The local quote builder modal intercepts clicks, hiding the shared cart flow. Backend API /api/quotes correctly handles cart items with packing_type, delivery_location (freight pincode), and customer_rfq_no fields. Search tab's addToCart integration works correctly. Focus next on verifying the consolidated cart UX after main agent fixes the duplicate button issue.
